---
name: 💡 Feature request / idea
about: Suggest an improvement or a new token-saving idea
title: "[idea] "
labels: enhancement
---

**What would you like Tokenade to do?**
Describe the feature or improvement.

**What problem does it solve?**
What are you trying to achieve? What does it cost you today (tokens, friction)?

**Anything else?**
Examples, your agent/workflow, links — anything that helps.
